questionHtml: As the spaceship passes the space station, the space station sends a radio signal back to the Earth. The reception of this signal at the Earth is event A. Determine the time on the Earth clock when event A occurs.
markschemeHtml:
signal will take «112.5 × 0.60 =» 67.5 «minutes» to reach Earth «as it travels at c»

OR

signal will take « 1.2 × 10 12 3 × 10 8 =» 4000 «s»

 

total time «= 67.5 + 112.5» = 180 minutes or 3.00 h or 3:00am

 

[2 marks]
